product.name: ArSuprem
product.categorySourceGroup: High Visible Warp Knit Fabrics for Safety Jackets
product.titleDescriptor: 100% Cotton Vat Dyed Single Jersey Fabric
product.specLine: 220 g/m², 100% Cotton, Single Jersey, Vat Dyed Knit Fabric
descriptions: 100% cotton single jersey workwear knit fabric with very high chlorinated bleaching and light fastness.
ArSuprem fabric are produced from the best quality combed yarn Turkish Cotton.
It is resistant to very high sun level, with fastness level of 6 to 7.
ArSuprem fabrics can be bleached with peroxide and hypochloride without whitening in color.
Vat dyed ArSuprem products can be used in the most hard working conditions and in military area.
100% Cotton Vat Dyed Single Jersey Fabric
220 g/m², 100% Cotton, Single Jersey, Vat Dyed Knit Fabric
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
